privileged_info_summary: All metadata values are verified and consistent across task files. The task requires creating a mutual TLS (mTLS) authentication system in Docker with the following specifications: Project directory at /home/ga/projects/tls-setup containing self-signed certificates with CA CN 'AcmeCorp Internal CA', server certificate for 'acme-gateway' with SAN entries for 'acme-gateway' and 'localhost', and client certificate for 'acme-backend-client'. A Docker network named 'acme-tls-net' must be created with an Nginx container named 'acme-gateway' on port 443 enforcing mutual TLS. Success verification includes functional mTLS tests (rejection without client certificate, acceptance with valid certificate), with curl output saved to /home/ga/Desktop/tls_verification.txt and PKI documentation to /home/ga/Desktop/pki_documentation.txt.
